summary: The Gradle task :module:spring-boot-actuator:checkFormatMain failed during the build, indicating code formatting violations in the spring-boot-actuator module.
root_cause: Code in the spring-boot-actuator module does not conform to the project's code formatting standards.

evidence.reason: Direct indication of formatting check failure in the spring-boot-actuator module
Explicit task execution failure confirming the format check failed
Overall build failure confirmation immediately following the format check failure

suggested_fix: Review and correct code formatting in the spring-boot-actuator module to comply with project formatting standards.
